\tzpentry{ID5942}{Delta Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5942 introduces Delta Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\n K_{ij} = \\frac{K_0}{\\Delta_{ij} + \\delta}\\,, \\tag{6}\n \\]
